description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided briefcase with a matte black exterior and gold-colored metal hardware. The case features a sturdy, rectangular handle on the top, also in black, attached with gold metal brackets. Two gold latches are visible on the top edge, likely serving as the main locking mechanism. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible logos, external pockets, or decorative elements. The corners are sharply defined without any additional reinforcements. The overall design is minimalist and professional, suitable for business or formal urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black hard-sided briefcase with gold metal latches and a sturdy rectangular handle, featuring a minimalist, professional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, handle, and gold latches on the top edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the broad, flat surface, handle, and two gold latches.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the slim profile and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, unadorned surface and no visible hardware except the handle base.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, rigid handle made of black plastic or coated metal, attached with gold metal brackets; fixed, non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two gold metal latches on the top edge, likely snap or clasp type; no visible key or combination lock.
